##RRUFFID=R130031
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=BaNaFe^2+^_4_Ti_2_(Si_2_O_7_)_2_O_2_(OH)_2_F
##LOCALITY=Dmitrievka village, Mariupol' Massif, Azov Sea Region, Donets'k Oblast', Ukraine
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish brown massive, exhibiting good cleavage
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130031
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.709 b: 13.791 c: 20.754 alpha: 90 beta: 95.097 gamma: 90 volume: 3052.9 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
